---
name: Report a Bug
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the bug/issue you are experiencing - the more detail you can provide about the incorrect behaviour the better.

## How to Reproduce
Provide a description or step-by-step instructions on how to reproduce the bug/issue - this will help to track down the issue faster.

## Supporting Materials
Provide any screenshots, log files or any other applicable materials that can help further diagnose the issue.
